            </p>
          </div>
          <div style={{display: "flex", position: "static", width: "133.703px", height: "28px", marginLeft: "179.82px", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "visible", flexFlow: "row", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "1", fontFamily: ""Inter var", "Inter var Fallback", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Noto Sans", sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"", fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "400", lineHeight: "18px", textAlign: "start", letterSpacing: "-0.026px", color: "rgb(238, 238, 238)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderStyle: "solid", borderColor: "rgb(238, 238, 238)", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", strokeWidth: "1px"}}>
            <button style={{display: "flex", position: "static", width: "133.703px", height: "28px", padding: "6px 10px", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "visible", flexFlow: "row", justifyContent: "center", alignItems: "center", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "0", fontFamily: ""Inter var", "Inter var Fallback", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Noto Sans", sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"", fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "500", lineHeight: "19px", textAlign: "center", color: "rgb(25, 25, 25)", whiteSpace: "nowrap", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgb(236, 93, 94)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderWidth: "1px", borderStyle: "solid", borderColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", borderRadius: "9999px", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", strokeWidth: "1px"}}>
              Delete workspace
            </button>
          </div>
        </header>
      </section>
    </div>
  </div>
  );
}
